mapper.insert: insert into aiw_product_investment_profile (biz_id, product_biz_id, asset_class, risk_summary, volatility_level, liquidity_level, max_drawdown, suitable_risk_level, mock_tradable, min_holding_days, trading_notes, data_quality_score, created_at, updated_at) values (#{bizId}, #{productBizId}, #{assetClass}, #{riskSummary}, #{volatilityLevel}, #{liquidityLevel}, #{maxDrawdown}, #{suitableRiskLevel}, #{mockTradable}, #{minHoldingDays}, #{tradingNotes}, #{dataQualityScore}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}) on duplicate key update asset_class = values(asset_class), risk_summary = values(risk_summary), volatility_level = values(volatility_level), liquidity_level = values(liquidity_level), max_drawdown = values(max_drawdown), suitable_risk_level = values(suitable_risk_level), mock_tradable = values(mock_tradable), min_holding_days = values(min_holding_days), trading_notes = values(trading_notes), data_quality_score = values(data_quality_score), updated_at = values(updated_at)
